name: slack-pi-bridge
description: A personal Slack bridge that uses pi to reply to selected DMs.

scripts.build: esbuild src/index.js --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --target=node20 --banner:js='import { createRequire as __createRequire } from "node:module"; const require = __createRequire(import.meta.url);' --outfile=target/slack-pi-bridge.mjs
